docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICHAEL, YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 DAKOTA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $1,179.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,179.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
